source_jobs.title: Sales Development Representative, London
source_jobs.description:
About Marloo

Financial advisers carry an extraordinary responsibility. They guide people through the most important financial decisions of their lives. For too long the tools available to them have been unworthy of that responsibility.

We are building the AI partner that changes that. Not a notetaker, but the infrastructure the profession has always needed and never had.

Backed by Blackbird Ventures, the first and largest investor in Canva. In under a year we have onboarded 650+ firms across six countries with almost zero churn. We are at the beginning of something significant and the momentum speaks for itself.



The role

The UK mid market, around 550 firms with 6 to 50 advisers, is wide open. We are looking for our first dedicated outbound hire to go after it.

You will build the function from scratch: the list, the messaging, the cadence, the playbook. We will figure out what works together and you will own running it.

You will coordinate with Georgia (events and partnerships) and Jack (UK go to market) so accounts do not overlap. Larger firms (10+ advisers) hand off to the founding team after the first demo. Smaller firms you own through to close.

This is a stepping stone role. The path from here is to AE, sales lead, or wherever your spike takes you.

What you'll do

 - Build Marloo's outbound motion

 - Own your target list, your outreach, and the systems that make it repeatable

 - Use AI as leverage. Whatever tool gets you to a booked demo faster

 - Run first demos for smaller firms and close them yourself

 - Hand off larger firms to the founding team after the first demo

 - Feed the market back to us: objections, competitor mentions, what is landing

You're a fit if

 - You have done outbound before, formally or through scrappy hustle at an early stage company

 - You are coachable, hungry, competitive, and sharp

 - You are a natural on the phone and your cold outreach does not sound like cold outreach

 - You would rather be making calls than sitting in planning meetings

 - You are an active AI user who finds leverage in every tool you touch

 - You are London based and want to be in the office

Nice to have

 - Experience with Clay, Apollo, or LinkedIn Sales Navigator

 - Background in fintech, financial services, or regulated industries

 - Early stage startup experience

Compensation and benefits

 - £40,000 to £60,000 base · Offers Equity · Offers Commission

 - Office first in central London

Salary range: £40-60k depending on experience. Exceptions on a case-by-case basis and determined relative to open compensation standards. Happy to discuss what that would look like for you specifically during our interview process.

source_jobs.title: Founding Engineer, London
source_jobs.description:
About Marloo

Financial advisers carry an extraordinary responsibility. They guide people through the most important financial decisions of their lives. For too long the tools available to them have been unworthy of that responsibility.

We are building the AI partner that changes that. Not a notetaker, but the infrastructure the profession has always needed and never had.

Backed by Blackbird Ventures, the first and largest investor in Canva. In under a year we have onboarded 650+ firms across six countries with almost zero churn. We are at the beginning of something significant and the momentum speaks for itself.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 

Full-stack development

Build and own core product features end-to-end. You'll work across the stack, from backend infrastructure to frontend experiences, with a bias toward shipping fast and iterating.

Architecture ownership

Establish foundational patterns and technical decisions that will scale with the company. You'll be the codebase authority and shape the engineering culture.

Product collaboration

Work directly with founders to translate user needs into technical solutions. Your business acumen and product intuition matter as much as your coding ability.

AI-native development

Use AI tools daily for architecting, building, and debugging across stacks. We expect you to be a power user of modern AI development tools.

 


YOU'RE A FIT IF

 

 - Full-stack/backend coding excellence — talent prioritised over years of experience

 - Deep mission commitment regarding financial advisory transformation

 - Business acumen with product and growth orientation

 - Continuous learning drive for 0-1 development cycles

 - Customer obsession, impact focus, intellectual curiosity, execution speed

 - High risk tolerance and comfort with ambiguity

 - Collaborative long-term mindset

 - Daily AI tool proficiency for architecting, building, debugging across stacks

 - Prioritises in-person collaboration and able to travel internationally

 


NICE TO HAVE

 

 - Engineering hiring, management, and development track record

 - Startup experience navigating critical milestones toward product-market fit

 - Security infrastructure and data privacy compliance implementation experience

Salary range: £70-£90k depending on experience. Exceptions on a case-by-case basis and determined relative to open compensation standards. Happy to discuss what that would look like for you specifically during our interview process.

source_jobs.title: GTM Associate, London
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT MARLOO

Financial advisers carry an extraordinary responsibility. They guide people through the most important financial decisions of their lives. For too long the tools available to them have been unworthy of that responsibility.

We are building the AI partner that changes that. Not a notetaker, but the infrastructure the profession has always needed and never had.

Backed by Blackbird Ventures, the first and largest investor in Canva. In under a year we have onboarded 650+ firms across six countries with almost zero churn. We are at the beginning of something significant and the momentum speaks for itself.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 

Deliver compelling demos

Run product demonstrations at scale, customising value propositions to prospect needs and converting warm leads into paying customers.

Own customer onboarding

Shepherd new users from signup through initial value achievement, building confidence and removing friction points.

Drive conversion and retention

Guide customers from trial to paid status while demonstrating ROI and ensuring sustained value.

Build momentum

Execute creative market engagement through events, webinars, customer advocacy, and outreach strategies.

Solve critical problems

Own outcomes across GTM, operations, product, and hiring, launching manual experiments before scaling.

 


YOU'RE A FIT IF

 

 - 2+ years customer-facing experience in consulting, startups, sales, or customer success

 - Strong communication skills connecting features to business outcomes

 - Low ego with ambitious, gritty mentality; high bias toward action

 - Active AI power user leveraging technology for 10x productivity

 - Coachable with rapid learning velocity

 - Commitment to in-person London office collaboration with international travel capability

 - UK work authorisation without visa sponsorship

 


NICE TO HAVE

 

 - High-growth startup background

 - Financial services, wealth management, or financial advice exposure

Salary range: £40-£70k depending on experience. Exceptions on a case-by-case basis and determined relative to open compensation standards. Happy to discuss what that would look like for you specifically during our interview process.

source_jobs.title: AI Operations Associate, Wellington
source_jobs.description:
About Marloo

Financial advisers carry an extraordinary responsibility. They guide people through the most important financial decisions of their lives. For too long the tools available to them have been unworthy of that responsibility.

We are building the AI partner that changes that. Not a notetaker, but the infrastructure the profession has always needed and never had.

Backed by Blackbird Ventures, the first and largest investor in Canva. In under a year we have onboarded 650+ firms across six countries with almost zero churn. We are at the beginning of something significant and the momentum speaks for itself.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 

Customer success

Ensure that advisers using Marloo are set up for success and experience delight when they use the product. Troubleshoot issues, answer questions, and make sure every interaction leaves them feeling supported.

Operations

Keep the machine running. Invoicing, onboarding workflows, internal processes – you'll spot what's broken and fix it.

Customer insights

Surface patterns from support conversations to the product team. Your observations will directly shape what we build.

General pitching in

We're building a team of highly empowered doers. Everyone pitches in on the random tasks that pop up along the way.

 


YOU'RE A FIT IF

 

 - You want direct exposure to all aspects of building and scaling a company

 - You're comfortable with high ownership and responsibility

 - You have burning ambition and drive for significant achievement

 - You turn ambiguity into your secret weapon: you dive in, take charge, and figure things out

 - You can clearly empathise with financial advisers and communicate the value of Marloo

 - You don't need to be experienced in financial services, but some understanding of the industry would be helpful

 - You want to eventually shape your own role and journey

 - Willing to prioritise in-person collaboration. Also able to travel internationally as needed

Salary range: $70-$100k depending on experience. Exceptions on a case-by-case basis and determined relative to open compensation standards. Happy to discuss what that would look like for you specifically during our interview process.
